description_long: This sculpture depicts a robed human figure standing upright on a circular base. The figure wears a tall, cylindrical hat and is draped in a voluminous cloak that covers most of the body, with one arm visible holding the cloak closed at the chest. The facial features are subtle but discernible, and the overall posture suggests a sense of dignity or contemplation. The back of the sculpture is smooth and unadorned, emphasizing the flowing lines of the cloak. The surface appears to be made of a dark, metallic material with a matte finish, giving it a somber and stately presence. The base is slightly raised and rounded, providing stability and a sense of separation from the ground.
description: A dark, metallic sculpture of a robed human figure with a tall hat, standing on a circular base. The figure is draped in a flowing cloak, with one arm visible holding the garment closed.
description_view_0: Front view showing the detailed face, tall hat, and the arm holding the cloak at the chest.
description_view_1: Left side view highlighting the depth of the cloak and the profile of the hat and face.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the smooth, unadorned back of the cloak and the rounded base.
description_view_3: Right side view showing the side profile of the figure and the draping of the cloak.
attribute_subject_matter: human figure in a robe and tall hat
attribute_location_context: No visible context; background is isolated and does not indicate a specific setting.
